title: Fast Spawn
description: Plugin that adds Light weight /spawn command with advanced Configuration, join massage (can't turn off) , Direction (yaw,pitch)
body:
# Fast Spawn 
Fast Spawn is Plugin that adds /spawn 

### Featues list
Join Spawn,
Join message,
Direction,
Funcion in all world*,

### Does Thins Plugin Have Config.yml?
yea! , here it is :)

# Config file for FastSpawn plugin


```
world: world 
x: 100.0                 #This all Coordinates are for /spawn and join
y: 64.0
z: 100.0
yaw: 0.0
pitch: 0.0

messages:
  teleportation: "&6Teleporting to spawn!"
  only-players: "&cThis command can only be used by players."
  join: ""                         #i dont recommend it
  title: "&bWelcome to &eMyServer!"
  subtitle: "&fEnjoy your stay!"
```

This is all <3
see my other project :)

### FastSpawn Permissions:
fastspawn.spawn
